title: Camarones en Salsa de Champiñones
description: A delicious Mexican dish featuring shrimp cooked in a rich and flavorful mushroom sauce. Serve with crusty bread or over rice for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat the buttery in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chupe de camarones and cook until pink, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove the shrimp from the skillet and set aside.
Reduce heat to medium and add the lotus root to the skillet. Cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the de to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the crisp to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Return the shrimp to the skillet and stir to combine with the mushroom sauce.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the camarones en salsa de champiñones hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
